name: @clearline/data-access-analytics
description: Analytics data-access layer for clearline-web: React Query hooks over the independently-fetched /api/analytics/* dashboard sections (summary, spend-by-category, by-department, top-vendors, recent-activity), plus the pure client-side date-range validation and freshness helpers behind US-CW-015. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-009 (US-CW-015 Spend Analytics Dashboard).
